Layout.name: FAT Translated Texts

Calculation.Text: "Type a text to replace found text"

StyledText.Data: Find in both <<Language Translated @ Title::Language>> and <<Language Original @ Title::Language>>

<<FAT Title::Reference title>> | View translated text with status: <<gViewTranslationStatus>> | Number of text fields: <<FAT Text translated::Number of records>> | Number of words in found set: <<Number of words total>>
Click the review progress buttons below to filter and view only transations that are: • Not reviewed yet • In progress • Approved

Press Get to get a copy of the current translated text to the field below. Edit and compare to create an alternative translation. Select a Translation API and click Re-translate to get a new machine translation. Press Use if you want to use this translation instead of the current translation. Please note, this text is not saved when leaving the layout.

ParagraphStyle.Text: Please note, this text is not saved when leaving the layout.

Calculation.Text: Case (IsEmpty(FAT Text translated::gPackage); SetProperty ( "level" ; 0 ); SetProperty ( "exportMode" ; "Media update" ) & SetProperty ( "level" ; 1 ) & SetProperty ( "caller" ; "title" ) )

Case ( Not IsEmpty (FAT Text translated::gPackage ); SetProperty ( "level" ; 1 ) & SetProperty ( "caller" ; "title" ) & SetProperty ( "server_mode" ; "Preview" ) & SetProperty ( "package_dir" ; FAT Package @ Translation Selected::Export Package Sub Path ) & SetProperty ( "package_friendly_id" ; FAT Package @ Translation Selected::JSON Friendly id ) & SetProperty ( "package_type_name" ; FAT Package @ Translation Selected::Package type name ); "" )

LayoutObject.name: ObjectEnterTrigger1
Re-translate dimmed

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "text_to_translate" ; FAT Text @ Translation::Text) & SetProperty ( "text_ref_num" ; FAT Text @ Translation::RecordNumberReference)
SetProperty ( "status" ; "Not translated") & SetProperty ( "num_of_texts" ; FAT Title::TFs Not_translated )
SetProperty ( "status" ; "Not reviewed") & SetProperty ( "num_of_texts" ; FAT Title::TFs Not_reviewed )
SetProperty ( "status" ; "In progress") & SetProperty ( "num_of_texts" ; FAT Title::TFs In_progress )
SetProperty ( "status" ; "Sent to API") & SetProperty ( "num_of_texts" ; FAT Title::TFs Sent_to_api)

StyledText.Data: Sent to API: <<FAT Title::TFs Sent_to_api>> texts.

LayoutObject.name: ObjectEnterTrigger2

Calculation.Text: "Export all texts to a Word document (HTML)"
Not PatternCount ( FAT Text @ Translation::Text ; "</" ) Or FAT Text translated::Source item type = "media"
"View all texts in the whole Title"

StyledText.Data: Set approval state by clicking the circles below: Black = Not translated yet Red = Translation not reviewed yet Yellow = Review in progress Green = Translation approved Click magnifying glass to find the text in the right context.

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "status" ; "Not reviewed") & SetProperty ( "num_of_texts" ; FAT Package Localisation @ Translation::<Field Missing> )

StyledText.Data: Not reviewed: <<FAT Package Localisation @ Translation::<Field Missing>>> texts.

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "status" ; "In progress") & SetProperty ( "num_of_texts" ; FAT Package Localisation @ Translation::<Field Missing> )

StyledText.Data: In progress: <<FAT Package Localisation @ Translation::<Field Missing>>> texts.

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "status" ; "Approved") & SetProperty ( "num_of_texts" ; FAT Package Localisation @ Translation::<Field Missing> )

StyledText.Data: Approved: <<FAT Package Localisation @ Translation::<Field Missing>>> texts.

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "status" ; "Sent to API") & SetProperty ( "num_of_texts" ; FAT Package Localisation @ Translation::<Field Missing> )

StyledText.Data: Sent to API: <<FAT Localisation @ Translation::<Field Missing>>> texts.

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "status" ; "Not translated") & SetProperty ( "num_of_texts" ; FAT Package Localisation @ Translation::<Field Missing> )

StyledText.Data: Not translated: <<FAT Package Localisation @ Translation::<Field Missing>>> texts.

Last modified by: <<FAT Text @ Translation::ModifiedBy>> • <<FAT Text @ Translation::ModificationTimeStamp>> Created by: <<FAT Text @ Translation::CreatedBy>> • <<FAT Text @ Translation::CreationTimestamp>>

CharacterStyle.Text: Created by: <<FAT Text @ Translation::CreatedBy>> • <<FAT Text @ Translation::CreationTimestamp>>

LayoutObject.name: NR Oval
IP Oval
AP Oval
NR Oval Copy
Red
Yellow
Green
Black

Calculation.Text: (Not PatternCount ( FAT Text @ Translation::Text ; "<span>" ) And PatternCount ( FAT Text @ Translation::Text ; "</" )) And FAT Text translated::Source item type ≠ "Media"
PatternCount ( FAT Text @ Translation::Text ; "<span>" ) Or Not PatternCount ( FAT Text @ Translation::Text ; "</" ) Or FAT Text translated::Source item type = "media" //subtitle

StyledText.Data: Click here to edit this text

Calculation.Text: "Edit HTML text in rich text editor"
PatternCount ( FAT Text @ Translation::Text ; "<span>" ) Or Not PatternCount ( FAT Text @ Translation::Text ; "</" ) Or FAT Text translated::Source item type = "media" // subtitle
SetProperty ( "status" ; "Not translated") & SetProperty ( "num_of_texts" ; FAT Localisation @ Translation::<Field Missing> )

StyledText.Data: Not translated: <<FAT Localisation @ Translation::<Field Missing>>> texts.

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "status" ; "Not reviewed") & SetProperty ( "num_of_texts" ; FAT Localisation @ Translation::<Field Missing> )

StyledText.Data: Not reviewed: <<FAT Localisation @ Translation::<Field Missing>>> texts.

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "status" ; "In progress") & SetProperty ( "num_of_texts" ; FAT Localisation @ Translation::<Field Missing> )

StyledText.Data: In progress: <<FAT Localisation @ Translation::<Field Missing>>> texts.

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "status" ; "Sent to API") & SetProperty ( "num_of_texts" ; FAT Localisation @ Translation::<Field Missing>)

StyledText.Data: Sent to API: <<FAT Localisation @ Translation::<Field Missing>>> texts.

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "status" ; "Approved") & SetProperty ( "num_of_texts" ; FAT Localisation @ Translation::<Field Missing> )
